name: Cottage Cheese Puff
recipeIngredient: 3/4 Cup Soft Whole Wheat Bread Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine cottage cheese, bread crumbs, flour, 1/3 cup parsley, green onion, margarine and salt. Set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs with an electric mixer on high speed for about minutes or until thick and lemon colored. Gradually pour the cottage cheese mixture over the beaten eggs, folding to combine.
3. Pour the egg mixture into a greased 5 or 6 cup souffle dish or casserole.
4. Bake in a 350 degree oven for about 1 hour until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon parsley. Serve immediately. Serves 6.
